intro.title: Heavy-duty fabrication for sheds, gates, and farm equipment
intro.subtitle: Arjun Industries delivers precision fabrication for industrial, residential, and agricultural needs. From warehouse sheds to custom gates and farm machinery, we build durable structures that last.

testimonials.name: Rahul Verma
testimonials.quote: Strong fabrication work and clean finishing. The shed was delivered on time and the team handled everything smoothly.

testimonials.name: Suman Yadav
testimonials.quote: Good quality trolley build and quick support for minor adjustments. Very reliable service.

home.cta: Share your measurements or photos on WhatsApp for a quick estimate.

about.title: About Arjun Industries
about.intro: Arjun Industries is a trusted fabrication and welding workshop in Bhopal, serving industrial, residential, and agricultural clients.
about.body: We specialize in custom metal work, durable MS structures, and precision finishing for projects of all sizes. Our team handles site measurements, material planning, fabrication, and installation. From sheds and gates to farm equipment and repair work, we deliver quality craftsmanship backed by reliable service.

focusCards.title: Durable fabrication

focusCards.title: Custom work as per site

focusCards.title: Reliable support
focusCards.description: On-time delivery with repair and modification support.
